cleavage agent: the proteins were in-gel digested with trypsin
enrichment method: co-immunoprecipitated with GAPC2-Flag using an anti-Flag antibody
fractionation method: separation of the proteins on a polyacrylamide gel
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Scientific)
labeling: the mass spectrometry-based protein sequencing identified the nuclear factor Y subunit C10 (NF-YC10) co-precipitated specifically with GAPC2
reduction reagent: buffer B (50 mM Tris-HCl pH7.8, 5 mM MgCl2, 10 mM β-mercaptoethanol, and 20% (v/v) glycerol)
